description: You are a Senior Business Intelligence Engineer at LogiQuant Technologies. The operations team needs a comprehensive Order Fulfillment Analytics Dashboard to optimize fulfillment workflows by order priority and product container type. Using the dataset at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\OracleAnalyticsData\order_lines.csv, create an Oracle Analytics workbook named 'fulfillment_analytics' containing three specific canvases. The 'Priority Breakdown' canvas should analyze total Sales by Order Priority and include a calculated column named 'Revenue_Per_Line' (formula: Sales / Quantity Ordered). The 'Priority Profitability' canvas should analyze total Profit and average Revenue_Per_Line by Order Priority. The 'Container Fulfillment' canvas should analyze total Shipping Cost and total Sales by Product Container type, including a calculated column named 'Fulfillment_Margin' (formula: (Sales - Shipping Cost) / Sales). Save the final workbook as 'fulfillment_analytics.dva' to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.
